attribution: Music: "Carefree" by Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) — licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0). Sound effects: original works released under CC0 1.0 (public domain).
comment: The audio engine fetches these files at runtime and falls back to synthesized tones if a file is missing or cannot be decoded (e.g. offline). To add more audio, drop CC0/CC-BY files into music/ or sfx/ and reference them above.
